defense.critical_failure: As failure, but the target takes double the persistent bleed damage.
defense.failure: The target takes the full persistent bleed damage. Until the bleeding stops, the target has weakness 1 to piercing and slashing damage.
defense.success: The target takes half the persistent bleed damage.

heightened.text: The persistent bleed damage increases by 2d6.

spell.name: Blood Vendetta
spell.text: You curse the target, punishing it for having the audacity to spill your blood. The target takes 2d6 persistent bleed damage and must attempt a Will save.

traits.name: Curse
traits.text: A curse is an effect that places some long-term affliction on a creature. Curses are always magical and are typically the result of a spell or trap. Effects with this trait can be removed only by effects that specifically target curses.

spell.trigger: A creature deals piercing, slashing, or persistent bleed damage to you
